Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction

All Superinterfaces:
IHypAction, IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction
All Known Implementing Classes:
RewriteHypAction
Enclosing interface:
IHypAction
public static interface IHypAction.IRewriteHypAction extends IHypAction.IForwardInfHypAction
Interface implemented by hypothesis actions that perform forward inference on some sequent hypotheses, and then hide some of them. Such action can be seen as a rewrite action.
Since:
3.0
See Also:
  • IHypAction

  • Field Details

    • ACTION_TYPE

      static final String ACTION_TYPE
      The only legal action type for rewrite hypothesis actions.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getDisappearingHyps

      Collection<Predicate> getDisappearingHyps()
      Returns the set of hypotheses hidden by this action.

      In case the forward inference part of this action can be performed on a sequent, these hypotheses will disappear from the resulting sequent (i.e. they are hidden by this action). The exact description of what is performed can be found in the documentation of IInternalProverSequent.hideHypotheses(Collection).

      Returns:
      the set of hypotheses which are hidden by this action
